display.purpose: Hero headlines, page heroes. Uppercase bold italic Prequel only.

display-reg.purpose: Counters, editorial numbers, italic fragments. Prequel 400.

label.purpose: Navigation, button text, eyebrows, footer links.

handwritten.purpose: PCD. One per visual cluster. Client names, signature moments only.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default for all scroll-driven element entrances.

motion.name: ease-testimonial
motion.purpose: Testimonial slide-in — slightly softer than standard.

motion.name: entrance-scrub
motion.purpose: Section entrance animation. scrollStart: top bottom, scrollEnd: top 60%.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.note: font-size steps from 10px to 14px at this breakpoint

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: font-size steps to 16px; full desktop layout

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Always pill-shaped. kred fill, white text, sans label uppercase.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ed1d22; color: #fff; padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'League Spartan', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c91519; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Pill-shaped, 2px border, inherits text color. Inverts to kred on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: currentColor; padding: 0.625rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'League Spartan', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: 2px solid currentColor; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #ed1d22; color: #fff; border-color: #ed1d22; }

components.name: Text Link CTA
components.description: Tertiary CTA. Underlined display font + circled arrow. Arrow translates right on hover.
components.html: See Our Work
components.css: .ds-btn-text { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Prequel', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 4px; color: #ed1d22; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-text svg { transition: transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-text:hover svg { transform: translateX(6px); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Navigation pill. Transparent at rest. kred fill + white text on hover and active.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'League Spartan', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 9999px; transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page'] { background: #ed1d22; color: #fff; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Contact form field. Heavy 3px border, xl radius. No custom focus ring yet.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-family: 'League Spartan', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; background: #fff; border: 3px solid #242424; border-radius: 0.75rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #ed1d22; outline: 2px solid #ed1d22; outline-offset: 0; }

components.name: Section Container (frame)
components.description: The structural framing system. Variant border geometry encodes section tier. No shadows.
components.css: .section-container { border-style: solid; border-color: #242424; border-width: 3px; } .section-container--normal { border-width: 0; } .section-container--center { border-left-width: 3px; border-right-width: 3px; border-top-width: 0; border-bottom-width: 0; } .section-container--top { border-left-width: 3px; border-right-width: 3px; border-top-width: 3px; border-bottom-width: 0; border-top-left-radius: 1rem; border-top-right-radius: 1rem; } .section-container--bottom { border-left-width: 3px; border-right-width: 3px; border-top-width: 0; border-bottom-width: 3px; border-radius: 0 0 1rem 1rem; }
